nasb.text: Then I looked, and behold, four wheels beside the cherubim, one wheel beside each cherub; and the appearance of the wheels was like the gleam of a Tarshish stone.

esv.text: And I looked, and behold, there were four wheels beside the cherubim, one beside each cherub, and the appearance of the wheels was like sparkling beryl.

cnv.text: 我觀看，見眾基路伯旁邊有四個輪子；每一個基路伯旁邊都有一個輪子；輪子的樣子好像閃耀的水蒼玉。

ccb.text: 我又看见四个基路伯天使旁各有一个闪耀如绿宝石的轮子。
